Interface TermFeature

All Known Implementing Classes:
AtomTermFeature, BinarySumTermFeature, BinaryTermFeature, ClosedExpressionTermFeature, ConstTermFeature, ContainsExecutableCodeTermFeature, EliminableQuantifierTF, EqTermFeature, IsInductionVariable, IsNonRigidTermFeature, OperatorClassTF, OperatorTF, PrimitiveHeapTermFeature, PrintTermFeature, RecAndExistentiallyConnectedClausesFeature, RecSubTermFeature, ShannonTermFeature, SimplifiedSelectTermFeature, SortExtendsTransTermFeature, SubTermFeature, TermPredicateTermFeature
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface TermFeature
Interface for computing a cost for a given term or formula
